diagrams.title: OSI Model with Application Layer Highlighted
diagrams.description: Shows the 7-layer OSI model with Application Layer at the top and Physical Layer at bottom
diagrams.purpose: Understanding Application Layer position in network hierarchy and data flow direction through layers

diagrams.title: Client-Server Communication Model
diagrams.description: Diagram showing client-server architecture with multiple clients connecting to a central server
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how clients request services and servers respond in client-server model

diagrams.title: Socket Connection Process (TCP)
diagrams.description: Shows step-by-step TCP socket connection between client and server
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the socket programming workflow for establishing network communication

diagrams.title: Data Encapsulation Through OSI Layers
diagrams.description: Shows how data is encapsulated at each layer as it travels from application to physical medium
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how Application Layer data is transformed and passed through lower layers for transmission
